raw_consumer_statement:
I attempted to purchase a household rug from a small company named " XXXX XXXX '' in XXXX of 2023. 

I made the purchase, totaling {$2500.00}, over the phone. 

This company did not send the correct item. 

I sent the item back, and disputed the transaction with American Express after the merchant refused to refund the purchase. 

American Express has sided with the merchant, but the merchant furnished falsified documents. Basically, I was scammed by this company, " XXXX XXXX, '' and American Express has decided to believe their story, and resolve this dispute in their favor, despite my overwhelming evidence that I did not receive the correct merchandise. 

I have re-opened this dispute TWICE, and American Express has both times resolved it in favor of the merchant for reasons I can not believe. 

I was even told by American Express, to return what to received, and provide the tracking/delivery proof, WHICH I DID, and this will be resolved in your favor, and it was STILL resolved in favor of the merchant.
